data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Substitution history tracking' but did not provide any evidence confirming its implementation. The linked use case mentions the need for substitution history tracking, yet there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate this functionality is present or operational. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement as it remains unverified.
gaps: No evidence of substitution history tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
